data.title: Mount Ridley Mines Issues 350,000 New Shares Under Cleansing Notice
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Mount Ridley Mines Limited ( (AU:MRD) ) is now available.

Mount Ridley Mines Limited has issued 350,000 new shares in its capital, as recorded in an Appendix 2A dated 23 April 2026, and has notified the market via a statutory cleansing notice. The company states the shares were issued without a disclosure document under the Corporations Act, while confirming ongoing compliance with its financial reporting and continuous disclosure obligations and advising there is no excluded information requiring disclosure.

The announcement indicates that Mount Ridley is using its existing placement capacity to issue equity, which may marginally dilute existing shareholders but provides additional funding flexibility. By lodging the cleansing notice and affirming compliance with key Corporations Act provisions, the company facilitates secondary trading of the new shares and signals adherence to governance and disclosure standards expected by investors and regulators.

More about Mount Ridley Mines Limited

Mount Ridley Mines Limited is an Australia-based resources company listed on the ASX under the code MRD. The company is involved in mineral exploration and development activities, targeting opportunities within the Australian mining sector for value creation and growth.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$43.82M

data.title: BAIOO Chairman Boosts Stake With Fresh On-Market Share Purchases
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from BAIOO Family Interactive ( (HK:2100) ).

BAIOO Family Interactive announced that its chairman and executive director, Mr. Dai Jian, has increased his shareholding in the company through his indirectly owned vehicle, Stmoritz Investment Limited. Following a series of on-market purchases culminating on 22 April 2026, Stmoritz now holds about 691.4 million shares, representing roughly 24.1% of the company’s issued share capital.

The latest transaction involved the purchase of 166,000 shares at an average price of HK$0.504 per share, bringing Mr. Dai’s total acquisitions between 30 March and 22 April 2026 to 3,444,000 shares. The move signals strengthened insider confidence in BAIOO’s prospects and slightly tightens the chairman’s control position, a development that existing shareholders and potential investors may view as a supportive governance and valuation signal.

More about BAIOO Family Interactive

BAIOO Family Interactive Limited is a Cayman Islands–incorporated company listed in Hong Kong under stock code 2100. The group operates in the interactive entertainment sector, focusing on online and mobile products for family and youth audiences in the Chinese market and related digital consumer segments.

Average Trading Volume: 1,267,321

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$1.38B

data.title: CGN Mining Posts Solid Q1 2026 Uranium Output and Active Trading Position
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

CGN Mining Co ( (HK:1164) ) just unveiled an update.

CGN Mining reported that uranium deposits in which it holds interests produced 580.9 tonnes of uranium in the first quarter of 2026, achieving 97.1% of the quarterly production plan. Output was led by its 49%-owned Kazakhstan associate Ortalyk at 426.4 tonnes, while Semizbay-U produced 154.5 tonnes, with a sulfuric acid shortage temporarily weighing on the Semizbay mine but not expected to affect full-year production.

On the trading side, the group held 967 tonnes of uranium inventory at the end of March 2026 at an average cost of US$80.60 per pound U3O8, alongside contracted but undelivered sales of 2,519 tonnes at an average price of US$89.20 per pound. New contracts and settlements in the quarter show active two-way trading, suggesting stable demand and pricing for its uranium portfolio, while management cautioned that the unaudited figures may fluctuate with market and operational conditions.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1164) stock is a Buy with a HK$3.67 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CGN Mining Co stock, see the HK:1164 Stock Forecast page.

More about CGN Mining Co

CGN Mining Company Limited is a Hong Kong-listed uranium producer and trader incorporated in the Cayman Islands, with core operations focused on natural uranium assets in Kazakhstan. The group holds minority interests in Semizbay-U LLP and Mining Company Ortalyk LLP, supporting its role in the global nuclear fuel supply chain through upstream production and physical uranium trading.

Average Trading Volume: 63,078,996

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$32.53B

data.title: Norsk Hydro Calls Digital 2026 AGM as Shareholders Push Nuclear Power Proposals
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Norsk Hydro Asa ( (GB:0Q11) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Norsk Hydro ASA has called shareholders to its ordinary general meeting on 7 May 2026, which will be held as a fully digital event via the Lumi AGM platform, allowing online participation, advance voting and proxy voting. The company has made all relevant documentation for the meeting available on its website, including financial reports, remuneration guidelines, nomination committee recommendations and voting forms, to facilitate informed shareholder participation.

Among the items to be considered are multiple shareholder proposals requesting investigations into potential involvement in nuclear power, including the possible establishment of nuclear reactors and the use of nuclear energy in Hydro’s power sourcing, each accompanied by the board’s response. The inclusion of these proposals signals growing investor interest in how Hydro might diversify or secure its long-term energy supply, an issue that could influence the company’s future cost base, sustainability positioning and strategic direction within the energy-intensive aluminium industry.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:0Q11) stock is a Hold with a NOK95.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Norsk Hydro Asa stock, see the GB:0Q11 Stock Forecast page.

More about Norsk Hydro Asa

Norsk Hydro ASA is a Norwegian industrial company focused on aluminium production and energy. The group is a major global supplier of aluminium products and solutions, with operations that span the value chain from bauxite extraction and alumina refining to aluminium smelting and energy sourcing in support of its metal operations.

data.title: Beazley Wins AGM Backing for All Resolutions Amid Remuneration Dissent
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Beazley ( (GB:BEZ) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Beazley plc, the London‑listed specialist insurer that operates multiple highly rated Lloyd’s syndicates and regulated carriers in Europe, the U.S., Bermuda and other key markets, continues to build on its position in niche commercial lines including cyber, financial lines and specialty property. The group’s diversified geographic footprint and strong ratings underpin its ability to write complex risks for corporate and institutional clients.

At its 2026 annual general meeting held on 22 April, Beazley secured shareholder approval for all resolutions, including director re‑elections, auditor re‑appointment, authority to allot shares, a 25 pence per share interim dividend and share buyback powers. However, the company acknowledged notable dissent on the directors’ remuneration policy and long‑term incentive plan, and said it will continue engaging with shareholders and other stakeholders on resolutions that received less than 80% support.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:BEZ) stock is a Hold with a £1335.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Beazley stock, see the GB:BEZ Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BEZ Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BEZ is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial performance (growth, profitability, improving leverage) and attractive valuation (low P/E), partly offset by fundamental volatility and near-term technical overbought risk despite a clear uptrend.

To see Spark’s full report on BEZ stock, click here.

More about Beazley

Beazley plc is a specialist insurance group with operations across Europe, North America, Latin America, Bermuda and Asia, underwriting $6.1bn of gross premiums in 2025. The company manages six Lloyd’s syndicates, all rated A+ by A.M. Best, and offers market‑leading cover in lines such as directors’ and officers’, financial lines, cyber, property, marine and aviation, reinsurance, accident and life, and political risk and contingency.

Duxton Water Ltd. ( (AU:RIV) ) has issued an announcement.

Rivco Australia Limited has notified the ASX that director Edouard Peter has ceased his role on 17 April 2026, triggering disclosure of his final interests in the company’s securities. The notice details both his direct holdings of fully paid ordinary shares and bonus options, as well as substantial indirect interests held via family trusts, nominee arrangements and Duxton Capital Investments Pty Ltd, clarifying his residual exposure to the company for investors tracking governance and ownership changes.

The change in directorship and the transparency around Peter’s remaining equity stakes may signal a shift in governance dynamics at Duxton Water’s listed vehicle while reassuring the market that his significant indirect holdings remain in place. Stakeholders are likely to monitor whether this board change prompts any adjustments in strategic direction or capital management, given Peter’s ongoing financial alignment with the company through his trust and corporate interests.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:RIV) stock is a Buy with a A$1.65 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Duxton Water Ltd. stock, see the AU:RIV Stock Forecast page.

More about Duxton Water Ltd.

Duxton Water Ltd., listed through Rivco Australia Limited, operates in the water rights investment sector, focusing on holding and managing entitlements and related securities in Australia’s regulated water markets. The company provides investors with exposure to the value and income streams generated from agricultural and other water-dependent activities across key irrigation regions.

data.title: AJ Bell strengthens board with appointment of Libby Chambers as non-executive director
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from AJ BELL PLC ( (GB:AJB) ).

AJ Bell has appointed Elizabeth (Libby) G. Chambers as an independent non-executive director, effective 1 May 2026, as part of its board succession plans. Subject to regulatory approval, she will become Chair of the Remuneration Committee, succeeding Margaret Hassall after her five-year term on the board.

Chambers brings extensive financial services experience from senior roles at firms including Morgan Stanley, McKinsey, Barclays, Barclaycard, Western Union and Bank of America. Her current non-executive positions at Wise, TSB Bank and Kape Technologies, along with prior wealth management board roles, strengthen AJ Bell’s governance and strategic capabilities at a time when demand for accessible financial advice and investment support is rising in the UK.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:AJB) stock is a Hold with a £500.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on AJ BELL PLC stock, see the GB:AJB Stock Forecast page.
